summary: Tested Admin Partner Management features. All 5 features working correctly: Providers List with stats cards and filters, Provider Detail View with charts and tables, Suspend/Reactivate functionality, Subscription Actions (activate/extend/gift/cancel), and all admin actions properly logged.

issues: Console warning: Missing 'Description' or 'aria-describedby' for DialogContent (accessibility improvement, non-blocking)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Partner Management fully functional. Provider 'Moreati' (user_provider_001) has active subscription with extended period due to testing gift/extend actions. Action log contains test entries from suspend/reactivate and subscription actions. 'Test Provider Inc' provider exists but has 'En attente' status and no subscription.

feature_1_admin_providers_list.details: Providers tab shows: 7 stats cards (Total=2, Actifs=1, En attente=1, Suspendus=0, Abo Essai=0, Abo Actif=1, Rev. Abo=0€), search input, filter dropdown (Tous/Actifs/En attente/Suspendus), providers table with columns (Partenaire, Statut, Abonnement, Produits, Commandes, CA, Actions)

feature_2_admin_provider_detail_view.details: Detail view shows: profile info (name/email/phone/company/inscrit le), subscription card (status badge + 19€/mois + period end + mensualites payees + total paye), KPI cards (19 Produits, 6 Commandes, 0 Payees, 265.9€ CA Total), revenue bar chart (12 months), orders area chart (12 months), subscription payments table, recent orders table, action log with history

feature_3_admin_suspend_reactivate.details: Suspend button visible for active providers, triggers prompt for reason, updates status to 'Suspendu' (red badge), shows 'Reactiver' button. Reactivate restores status to 'Actif' (green badge). Both actions logged in action log with timestamp, admin name, and reason.

feature_4_admin_subscription_actions.details: 4 subscription action buttons visible: Activer, Prolonger, Offrir, Resilier. Gift dialog shows 'Offrir des mois' title with months input and reason field. Confirm button executes action and shows toast 'Abonnement modifie!'. All actions logged in action log.

feature_5_backend_api_tests.details: All 15 pytest tests passed: GET /api/admin/providers/detailed (returns providers with stats), GET /api/admin/providers/{user_id}/detail (returns monthly revenue data), PUT /api/admin/providers/{user_id}/status (suspend/reactivate with reason logging), PUT /api/admin/providers/{user_id}/subscription (gift/extend/cancel/activate with period updates)
